onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Help us tailor the experience to you. Takes about 1 minute.

step1.title: What's your experience level?
step1.beginner: Beginner — I haven't built a complete project yet
step1.advanced: Advanced — I work in software professionally

step2.title: What languages and tools do you use?
step2.hint: Select all that apply, or add your own.

step3.title: Which executor tools do you use?
step3.hint: PlanGraph will generate prompts tailored to your chosen tools.
